title: GSC API Freshness Proof Report — Jun 10-11, 2026
methodology: Independent GSC Search Analytics API pulls with fresh token refresh before each call.

daily_analysis.equal_reason: Same stale baseline from June 9. No new API pull was performed.
Same stale baseline from June 9 reused for third straight day. Backup cron (ae8940265cb8) and main cron both used the same stale data.

fresh_reality_check.staleness_gap: Reported 499 vs actual 242 = 257 impression overstatement (106%) — CRITICAL

stale_data_impact.false_confidence: Cron operated under assumption of stable 499 impressions. Reality: impressions declined from 415 (Jun 3-9) to 303 (Jun 4-10) to 242 (Jun 5-11). That's a 42% decline over the 3 latest windows.
stale_data_impact.misallocated_resources: CTR fixes targeted tool variants with 'high' impressions (e.g. mortgage-200k at 14 imp) based on stale data. Fresh data shows these pages are losing impressions.
stale_data_impact.correction_factor_violation: gsc-live-data-corrected.json still contains 'corrected_estimate.impressions: 716' — the 1.434x correction factor applied as if it were live data. This violates Phase 19.2 normalization policy.

28_day_window.click_nature: Likely branded/navigational search — someone searched 'qfinhub'. NOT an organic content conversion.

going_forward_rules.rule_1: Every daily run MUST pull fresh GSC API data with date range ending yesterday (accounting for 2-3 day GSC delay = end date = today - 3 days).
going_forward_rules.rule_2: If API pull fails, report GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE — do NOT use cached data as live.
going_forward_rules.rule_3: Manual UI comparison is FYI ONLY, separate field. NEVER in main KPI line.
going_forward_rules.rule_4: Correction factors (1.434x) are DOCUMENTATION ONLY. Never applied to official metrics.
going_forward_rules.rule_5: Save fresh API response with timestamp to .optimizer-data/gsc-api-fresh-{YYYY-MM-DD}.json for audit trail.
going_forward_rules.rule_6: Compare current pull to previous day's pull — if identical, flag DATA_STALE and investigate.
going_forward_rules.rule_7: Page dimension (aggregated) is the official KPI source. Query dimension undercounts due to anonymization.
